messages.content: These risk write-ups share funnel target nodes, which does NOT make them the same risk — a funnel is coarse, so mechanistically distinct risks (a certification clock, a grid-connection queue, a distributor line-review cycle) can all compile to the same node. PARTITION the cluster into groups of TRUE duplicates: same underlying mechanism, same causal story, such that presenting both to a client would read as repetition. Distinct risks come back as singleton groups (absorbs: []). For a genuine duplicate group, pick the best exemplar (sharpest mechanism, best evidence) as keepId and fold the absorbed write-ups' UNIQUE early-warning indicators into it. Over-merging destroys distinct insights — when in doubt, keep them separate.

content: {"rationale":"Three distinct mechanisms emerge. (1) Statista MW pipeline-stage blending inflating the CE geo split / CE-7-of-Europe multiplier: statista-stage-blend-tambase, statista-pipeline-mw-inflation, and statista-scale-colo-scope-inflation all argue the same thing — the single Statista 'colocation and scale-colocation' series counts non-energized/pipeline MW, exceeds CBRE reconciliation, and overstates the CE-of-Europe fraction. Same causal story, merge. (2) The unsourced 'Europe ≈ 30%' phantom multiplier: europe-share-arithmetic-ghost and europe-share-phantom-multiplier are the same risk — an invented regional split with regional evidence pointing to ~24%. Merge. (3) The intelligent-subset scope-down (basic/metered vs intelligent PDUs, Germany's slow intelligent CAGR): distinct product-scope mechanism, singleton. (4) The PDU+PSU cross-check ceiling contamination via substitute architecture (21% CAGR): psu-shelf-cagr-divergence and crosscheck-ceiling-contamination are the same mechanism — the combined-category growth rate reveals PSU/power-shelf substitute growth inflating the €495M ceiling. Merge.","groups":[{"keepId":"risk.ledger-self-audit.statista-scale-colo-scope-inflation","absorbs":["risk.demand-discontinuity.statista-stage-blend-tambase","risk.definition-scopedown.statista-pipeline-mw-inflation"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"DC Byte live vs total-supply ratios for Frankfurt, Amsterdam, Warsaw","where":"DC Byte market pages / quarterly market summaries","threshold":"Live share of total supply <55% in the CE hubs","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Energization delays cited by CE operators (grid connection queues, Amsterdam moratorium after-effects)","where":"Operator capex/earnings calls (Vantage, NTT GDC, Data4) and German TSO (TenneT/Amprion) connection-queue disclosures","threshold":"Multiple operators pushing CE energization dates by ≥12 months","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Country-level MW tables from the gated EUDCA 'State of European Data Centres 2026' report","where":"EUDCA report release and member briefings","threshold":"EUDCA CE country totals implying CE-7 <30% of Europe on a consistent scope","updates":"increases"}]},{"keepId":"risk.definition-scopedown.europe-share-arithmetic-ghost","absorbs":["risk.ledger-self-audit.europe-share-phantom-multiplier"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"EMEA share of rack-power / critical-infrastructure segment revenue disclosed by Vertiv and Schneider","where":"Vertiv 10-K segment disclosures and Schneider Electric annual report, Energy Management segment regional split","threshold":"EMEA consistently <25% of relevant segment revenue","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Headline EU rack-PDU market size once the directly-scoped report is opened","where":"IndexBox 'Rack PDUs Market in the European Union' report","threshold":"EU figure implying Europe <27% of the GVR global base","updates":"increases"}]},{"keepId":"risk.definition-scopedown.intelligent-subset-inflation","absorbs":[],"foldedIndicators":[]},{"keepId":"risk.definition-scopedown.crosscheck-ceiling-contamination","absorbs":["risk.boundary-substitution.psu-shelf-cagr-divergence-erodes-tambase"],"foldedIndicators":[{"signal":"Revenue mix between rack-PDU and PSU/power-shelf product lines at incumbents","where":"Vertiv quarterly earnings (critical power segment detail); Delta Electronics and LiteOn investor materials","threshold":"Shelf/PSU lines growing >2x the PDU line for two consecutive quarters","updates":"increases"},{"signal":"Implied PDU share of the combined PDU+PSU category at next report vintages","where":"Grand View Research rack-PDU update (2026 vintage); Research and Markets/BIS Europe PDUs+PSUs update","threshold":"Implied PDU share of the combined category dropping below 50%","updates":"increases"}]}]}
